message:
refactor(abi): migrate mount/ftok to native syscall wrappers

Replace libc::syscall callsites with typed native wrappers:

- mount(): replace raw libc::syscall(SYS_mount, ...) with
  syscall::sys_mount() returning Result, eliminating manual errno
  handling in favor of match-based error propagation
- ftok(): replace libc::syscall(SYS_stat, ...) with
  syscall::sys_newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, ...) for cross-architecture
  compatibility (SYS_stat doesn't exist on aarch64, newfstatat
  works on both x86_64 and aarch64)
- syscall/mod.rs: add sys_mount and sys_newfstatat wrapper functions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
